title: Shrimp and Bao Italian Fusion
description: A unique Italian dish featuring shrimp and bao as main ingredients. The result is a flavorful and savory meal that blends different cultures.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until pink and cooked through.
Add the italian seasoning and lemon juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cherry tomatoes to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the shrimp and cherry tomatoes over the steamed bao.
Garnish with fresh basil and serve immediately.
